summary: A shoe trading (swap-focused) website called Shoe Swapper with a 10% commission fee, AI-powered shoe authenticity verification and condition rating (0-100 scale) via photo upload, user profiles showing shoe collections and trade credibility ratings (0.0-5.0), and a negotiation/messaging tab for users to communicate about trades. Theme is red, black, and white with a street-culture aesthetic.
architectural_notes: Commission model: 10% fee based on shoe sale price, should be clearly promoted in UI
AI features: photo-based condition scoring (0-100) and fake detection — likely mocked or third-party integrated
Platform focus shifted from buying/selling to peer-to-peer shoe trading/swapping
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Dynamic street-style scene of two people exchanging/trading sneakers in an urban setting, bold red and black color grading, high energy and premium feel (trading-hero.dim_1200x600.png)

existing_features.title: Create a landing/home page that prominently promotes the platform's 10% commission fee model, explaining that the fee is calculated based on the final sale price of the shoe. Display this as a key trust and transparency feature with a clear call-to-action to start trading.

Build a shoe listing creation flow where sellers can upload a photo of their shoe. The photo upload triggers a simulated AI analysis that returns: (1) a condition rating on a scale of 0–100, and (2) an authenticity verdict (Authentic / Likely Fake) to help prevent scam listings. Display both results clearly before the listing is published.

Build a marketplace browsing page that displays active shoe listings as cards. Each card must show the shoe photo, name, asking price, condition score (0–100), authenticity badge (Authentic / Likely Fake), and the calculated 10% commission fee (shown as a separate line). Include basic filtering by condition score range and authenticity status.

Implement a user profile tab/page that displays the user's shoe collection (listings they have posted or acquired), and their trade credibility rating on a scale of 0.0 to 5.0 derived from their previous completed trades. Show the total number of trades completed alongside the rating.

Design a bold, street-culture-inspired visual theme for the entire app — dark backgrounds, high-contrast accent colors (e.g., neon orange or electric green), clean sans-serif typography, and a grid-forward layout that feels premium and urban. Apply this theme consistently across all pages and components.

Rename the app from its current name to 'Shoe Swapper' everywhere it appears — including the header logo in Layout.tsx, the page title in index.html, and any other branding references across the app. Update all copy to emphasize trading/swapping over buying and selling (e.g., 'Start Trading' instead of 'Buy Now', 'Swap' language throughout).

Retheme the entire app to a red, black, and white color palette. Replace all neon/electric accent colors (orange, green, etc.) with a primary red accent (e.g., #E11D48 or similar bold red), pure black backgrounds, and white text/surfaces. Update frontend/src/index.css CSS custom properties, frontend/tailwind.config.js color tokens, and all component classes consistently so the street-culture aesthetic is preserved but expressed in red, black, and white only.

Add a 'Negotiation' tab to the main navigation (Layout.tsx) and create a new Negotiation page/route. The page should allow users to send and view simulated messages to/from other users about potential shoe trades. Use mock/demo data for conversations (no real-time backend required). Display a list of conversation threads on the left and a message view on the right. Each conversation should reference a shoe listing by name. Messages should be stored in local component state or React Query cache.

Add a trading-focused hero image to the Home page. Place the generated image (trading-hero.dim_1200x600.png) prominently in the hero section of frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx, replacing or augmenting the current hero banner background. Serve it as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/.

new_feature_requests.summary: Shoe trading marketplace with 10% commission fee prominently displayed
Photo upload feature with AI-generated condition rating on a 0-100 scale
AI authenticity verification from uploaded photo to detect fake/counterfeit shoes
User profile tab showing shoe collection and trade credibility rating (0.0 to 5.0)
Rename app to 'Shoe Swapper' and update branding/colors to red, black, and white
Add a negotiation tab where users can message each other about trades
Add a trading-focused image on the home page hero section
